titleStmt.title: SII 24.245: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 245. (A.R. No. 101 of 1937-38) WEST WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Registers another sale of land to the bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by Dēvapperumāḷ-sāni, wife of Tiruvēṅgaḍadāsaṉ, a dāsanaṁbi of Tiruvaraṅgam. The record is dated in the fourth regnal year and the details quoted of the date viz., Siṁha, ba. 13, Monday, Pūśam, seem to correspond to A.D. 1317, August 5, Friday (not Monday); ·87; f.d.n. ·13.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatcittikkuRead ‘śrīmeykkirttikku’mel komāṟa paṉmarāṉa tri[ bhuvaṉaccakrava] ttikaḷ śrī kulaśekhara devaṟku yāṇṭu 4vatu nālāvatu siṅhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu trayoda
śiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattunāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭi kulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷāṉāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkat tiruppatiyil dāsanampi pperumāḷāṉa tiruveṅkaṭadāsan bhāryai Eṉ koḻuntaṉ taṉimālai Aḻakiyārāṉa tiruvaraṅka ṉai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya tiruṉantavaṉa nila vilai pramāṇam Ittiru koyilakaram śrī kodaṇḍarāmaccaturve
dimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku Iṟṟaināḷāl ṉāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta tiruṉantavaṉamāvatu tirukkuṟaippaṟṟut teṉṉoḻukil Eṉṉutāṉa tiru tukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai ṉalantikaḻ nārāyaṇa Amutaṉār tiruṉantavaṉattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai naṭuvil mepāṟkellai tiruppāṟkaṭal dāsan tiruṉantavaṉattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tirumuṭikkuṟaikkup pe
rumāḷ Eḻuṉtaruḷukiṟa tiruvitikkut teṟkum Āka Icaiṉta Iṉṉāṉkellaikku naṭuvu mikutikkuṟai Uṭ tiruṉantavaṉam kiḻmel kol 3(1/2) Ittiruṉanta vaṉam kol muṉṟaraikkum kol kku ø 10 Āka ø 3 10 5 Ippaṇam muppattañcum Itaṉ teṟkut tiruppāṟkaṭal dāsan tiruṉantavaṉattukku meṟkum meṭṭu l cuvarukku vaṭakkum maṉṟaccaviḷākattu Ellaikku vaṭakkum meṟpaṭi tiruppāṟkaṭal dāsan tiruṉantavaṉattukku kiḻakkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉkellaikku naṭuvu mikutikkuṟai Uṭpaṭak kiḻmel kol 5 Ittiruṉantavaṉam kol Aiñ cukkum kol 1 kku ø 10 1 Āka ø 5 10 5 Ippaṇam Aimpattaiñcum Āka Ittiru ṉantavaṉam kol 8(1/2) Itti
ruṉantavaṉam kol Eṭṭaraikkum pramāṇappaṭi mūlyamāṉa ø9 10 Ippaṇam toṇṇūṟum ṇṭapaṭi Eṉbharttā muṉṉāḷ tuḷuvaril ceṇṭu nāyakar pakkal Etiṟiṭai vāṅkiṉa paṇattukkum muṉṉāḷ Iraṇṭāvatu nāḷil viḷainilam naṭṭuppāḻākaiyil nel kaṭamaikku vaṭaceri Aḻakiya pāṇṭiya tevar pakkalum maṅkalattu kuṟippu Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkalum Etiṟiṭai vāṅkiṉa paṇattukku Ittiruṉantavaṉa vilaippaṭi paṇam toṇṇūṟum Aṉtarddaśākattukkuḷḷe Oru kiḻippaṭa vāṅkik kuṭuttu Ittiruṉantavaṉam viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku Ittevapperumāḷc cāṉiyeṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ittiruṉantavaṉattil
mel ṉokkiṉa maramu kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum bhāgamum bhāgāśrayamu maṟṟum Ep peṟpaṭṭa saka viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedi maṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku tevapperumāḷcāṉiyeṉ Ippaṭikaḷāl viṟṟuk kuṭutta Uṇmeṭu tiruṉantavaṉam kol muṉṟaraiyum Itaṉ teṟkut tiruṉantavaṉam kol Aiñcum Ākat tiruṉantavaṉam kol Eṭṭaraikkum Ippaṇam toṇṇūṟume vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavolaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai kāṭṭakkaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pra
māṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ koyilakaram śrī kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku tiru[ veṅkaṭadāsan bhā] ryai Eṉ koḻuntaṉ taṉimālai Aḻakiyā rāṉa tiruvaraṅkadāsaṉai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya tevapperumāḷ cāṉiyeṉ It tiruveṅkaṭadāsan bhāryai tevap perumāḷcāṉi sajñaiyāṉamaikkum Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ(m) tirunāvuṭaiyāṉ ciṅkapperumāḷ Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai taṉimālai Aḻakiyārāṉa tiruvaraṅka dāsan samjñayāṉamaikkum samjñaimāṭṭeṟintamaikkum Ivai Aṉantanārāyaṇa dāsan makaṉ Eṭuttakai Aḻakiyanāyaṉār Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ piṟakuvāḷi Aḻakiyaperumāḷ dāsaṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 24.245 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
